health.okDetail: Connection and backend OK. Data up to date.
health.degradedDetail: Recent failure in {{source}}. Some panels may show cached data.
health.offlineDetail: Your PC has lost internet connection. The app still uses cached data.
health.backendDownDetail: Draftboard's backend isn't responding. Limited functionality until it returns.

settings.title: Settings
settings.updateChannelHint: Stable = official releases only. Beta = pre-releases for early testers.

errors.genericDetail: The app encountered an unexpected error. The report has been sent automatically (no personal data) so we can fix it. If you can describe what you were doing when it happened, that helps a lot.

patch.newDetectedDetail: Reload the app to update tier-list, builds and matchups.

history.title: History
history.emptyFiltersDetail: Change role, queue or search to see more results.
history.emptyAllDetail: Open the LoL client to auto-detect, or add your Riot ID in Settings ⚙️.

viewBoundary.title: Something broke in this view
viewBoundary.subtitle: {{view}} · the rest of the app keeps working
viewBoundary.description: The error was reported automatically. You can retry — if it fails again, close the view and try something else.
